rulings.Case Title: TANDBERG,INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. MARGARET A SELTZER et al

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL KHOA PHAM VS. JC DECAUX SF INC et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 27, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANTS DANIEL GEBREMICHAEL AND J.C. DECAUX, SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S MOTION To Change Venue IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT J. C. DECAUX CAN BE SUED IN SAN FRANCISCO. ALTHOUGH IT IS A DISSOLVED CORPORATION, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE WHETHER IT HAS OR DOES NOT HAVE ASSETS IN SAN FRANCISCO. IT ALSO LISTS SAN FRANCISCO AS ITS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS AND ITS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS IS IN SAN FRANCISCO. HOWEVER BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, SANTA CLARA COUNTY IS A FAR MORE CONVENIENT FORUM FOR THIRD PARTY WITNESSES. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA SANOCHKINA et al VS. MATHEW HUI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And To Stay The Pending Action
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 27, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT RICHARD YUEN'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And To Stay The pending Action IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ADMIT THERE IS AN AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE THIS DISPUTE. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT DID NOT RESPOND TO THE REQUESTS TO MEDIATE OR ARBITRATION, SUCH CONDUCT DID NOT CONSTITUTE AN UNEQUIVOCAL REJECTION AND PLAINTFF'S LITIGATION COSTS IS NOT A FORM OF PREJUDICE. SEE SAINT AGNES MEDICAL CENTER V PACIFICARE OF CALIFORNIA (2003) 31 CAL 4TH 1887, 1203. MS. FINKELSON, AS AGENT FOR T. SANOCHKINA, IS BOUND BY THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. =(302/PJM/DD-X)
